# Integrity Closings CLT

> Integrity Closings CLT is a mobile notary and certified loan signing agent service based in Mint Hill, NC, owned by Frank Coxx. We travel to the client for notarizations and loan signings — home, office, hospital, nursing home, or any location — throughout the Charlotte metro area.

Phone: 980-505-8050 (call or text)
Service area: Charlotte, Mint Hill, Matthews, Concord, Monroe, Gastonia, Locust, Midland, Salisbury, and the surrounding Mecklenburg, Union, and Cabarrus county area in North Carolina.
Hours: Monday–Saturday 9:00am–7:00pm, with after-hours appointments available 7:00pm–11:00pm. Closed Sunday.

A notary public verifies identity and witnesses signatures. A notary is not an attorney and does not give legal advice or draft legal documents.

## Services

- [Mobile Notary Services in Charlotte, NC](https://www.integrityclosingsclt.com/mobile-notary-charlotte-nc): Overview of all services offered.
- [General Mobile Notary](https://www.integrityclosingsclt.com/general-notary-charlotte-nc): Affidavits, auto title transfers, I-9 verification, and general documents.
- [Hospital & Bedside Notary](https://www.integrityclosingsclt.com/hospital-notary-charlotte-nc): Bedside notarization for patients and families at medical facilities.
- [Nursing Home & Assisted Living Notary](https://www.integrityclosingsclt.com/nursing-home-notary-charlotte-nc): Notary visits for residents at nursing homes and memory care facilities.
- [Estate Planning & Power of Attorney](https://www.integrityclosingsclt.com/estate-notary-charlotte-nc): Wills, trusts, living wills, and advance directives.
- [Power of Attorney](https://www.integrityclosingsclt.com/power-of-attorney-estate-documents-charlotte-nc): Financial, medical, and general powers of attorney.
- [After-Hours & Emergency Notary](https://www.integrityclosingsclt.com/after-hours-mobile-notary-charlotte-nc): Evening and weekend appointments.
- [Loan Signing Agent](https://www.integrityclosingsclt.com/loan-signing-agent-charlotte-nc): Certified Notary Signing Agent for real estate closings and mortgage refinances.
- [Seller Documents](https://www.integrityclosingsclt.com/services/seller-documents): Deeds, settlement statements, affidavits of title for home sellers.
- [Lender Provided Documents](https://www.integrityclosingsclt.com/services/lender-provided-documents): Refinance packages, buyer/seller packages, HELOCs, loan modifications.
- [Title Company & Attorney Closing Support](https://www.integrityclosingsclt.com/title-company-attorney-closing-support-charlotte-nc): Field signing coverage for title companies and real estate attorneys.

## Key pages

- [Areas Served](https://www.integrityclosingsclt.com/areas-served): Full list of cities and counties covered.
- [About](https://www.integrityclosingsclt.com/about): About Frank Coxx and Integrity Closings CLT.
- [FAQ](https://www.integrityclosingsclt.com/faq): Common questions about fees, ID requirements, and scheduling.
- [Blog](https://www.integrityclosingsclt.com/blog): Articles on notary rules, loan signings, and estate documents in North Carolina.
- [Book an Appointment](https://www.integrityclosingsclt.com/booking): Online booking form.
- [Contact](https://www.integrityclosingsclt.com/contact): Contact form and direct contact details.
